meaning: n.(甲壳动物的)腹肢,游泳足
examples: The exoskeleton structure of female pleopod in Macrobrachium rosenbergii was primarily investigated by histological method.
After hatching, juveniles (juvenile stage 1 and 2) are also attached to mother's pleopod by means of their curved pereiopods for 6 weeks.
The tegument and exoskeleton structure and the cement glands activities of female pleopod in different physiological stages of Eriocheir sinensis were investigated by histological method.
